channel.title: Javascript on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Javascript on Arrans github.io

item.title: immich-app/immich
item.description: High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution.

item.title: outline/outline
item.description: The fastest knowledge base for growing teams. Beautiful, realtime collaborative, feature packed, and markdown compatible.

item.title: nextcloud/server
item.description: ☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

item.title: BuilderIO/micro-agent
item.description: An AI agent that writes (actually useful) code for you

item.description: 🌐 The Web OS! Free, Open-Source, and Self-Hostable.

item.description: An extremely fast bundler for the web

item.title: discourse/discourse
item.description: A platform for community discussion. Free, open, simple.

item.title: slint-ui/slint
item.description: Slint is a declarative GUI toolkit to build native user interfaces for Rust, C++, or JavaScript apps.

item.title: axios/axios
item.description: Promise based HTTP client for the browser and node.js

item.title: refinedev/refine
item.description: A React Framework for building internal tools, admin panels, dashboards & B2B apps with unmatched flexibility.

item.title: xenova/transformers.js
item.description: State-of-the-art Machine Learning for the web. Run 🤗 Transformers directly in your browser, with no need for a server!

item.title: transloadit/uppy
item.description: The next open source file uploader for web browsers 🐶

item.title: microsoft/TypeScript
item.description: TypeScript is a superset of JavaScript that compiles to clean JavaScript output.

item.title: NativeScript/NativeScript
item.description: ⚡ Empowering JavaScript with native platform APIs. ✨ Best of all worlds (TypeScript, Swift, Objective C, Kotlin, Java, Dart). Use what you love ❤️ Angular, Capacitor, Ionic, React, Solid, Svelte, Vue with: iOS (UIKit, SwiftUI), Android (View, Jetpack Compose), Dart (Flutter) and you name it compatible.

item.title: zulip/zulip
item.description: Zulip server and web application. Open-source team chat that helps teams stay productive and focused.

item.title: appwrite/appwrite
item.description: Your backend, minus the hassle.

item.title: gotify/server
item.description: A simple server for sending and receiving messages in real-time per WebSocket. (Includes a sleek web-ui)

item.description: Joplin - the secure note taking and to-do app with synchronisation capabilities for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android and iOS.

item.description: A tiny JavaScript runtime

item.title: usebruno/bruno
item.description: Opensource IDE For Exploring and Testing Api’s (lightweight alternative to postman/insomnia)

item.title: phaserjs/phaser
item.description: Phaser is a fun, free and fast 2D game framework for making HTML5 games for desktop and mobile web browsers, supporting Canvas and WebGL rendering.

item.title: fingerthief/minimal-chat
item.description: MinimalChat is a lightweight, open-source chat application that allows you to interact with various large language models.

item.description: 🗃️ Centralized State Management for Vue.js.

item.description: uBlock Origin - An efficient blocker for Chromium and Firefox. Fast and lean.

item.title: gopherjs/gopherjs
item.description: A compiler from Go to JavaScript for running Go code in a browser

item.description: 📊 An infographics generator with 30+ plugins and 300+ options to display stats about your GitHub account and render them as SVG, Markdown, PDF or JSON!

item.description: Silex live web creation, free/libre no-code website builder, next gen Webflow for the static web

item.description: The Pencil Project’s unique mission is to build a free and opensource tool for making diagrams and GUI prototyping that everyone can use.

item.title: Tropix126/fluent-svelte
item.description: A faithful implementation of Microsoft’s Fluent Design System in Svelte.

item.title: dropzone/dropzone
item.description: Dropzone is an easy to use drag’n’drop library. It supports image previews and shows nice progress bars.

item.title: felixrieseberg/macintosh.js
item.description: 🖥 A virtual Apple Macintosh with System 8, running in Electron. I’m sorry.

item.description: Online collaborative Whiteboard that is simple, free, easy to use and to deploy

item.description: JavaScript library to zip and unzip files supporting multi-core compression, compression streams, zip64, split files and encryption.

item.description: Klipse is a JavaScript plugin for embedding interactive code snippets in tech blogs.

item.description: Vecty lets you build responsive and dynamic web frontends in Go using WebAssembly, competing with modern web frameworks like React & VueJS.

item.description: Godzilla is a ES2015 to Go source code transpiler and runtime
